title: Auto unload model
description: Automatically unload other models when loading a new one

title: Idle auto-unload (minutes)
description: Unload the current model after this many minutes of no new messages. Set to 0 to disable.

title: Unload model after tool call
description: Unload the model immediately after tool calls complete. Use for agentic workflows where a lightweight tool model is followed by a heavier generation model.
